team.date_founded: Forged in the early sealed-city era of Venus, by workers who needed to vent something after their shifts in the pressure domes.
team.number_of_fans: Around 24 million, loud, intense, and proudly intimidating.
team.badge: An erupting volcano against a sulphur-yellow sky, lightning splitting the clouds.
team.home_kit: Molten orange and black with a jagged eruption pattern up the side.
team.away_kit: Sulphur yellow with black trim and a single lightning bolt.
team.third_kit: Ash-grey shot through with glowing orange seams.
team.history: Venus Volcanic play angry football. Raised under crushing pressure in sealed cities beneath an acid sky, the Furnace press, harry, and hound opponents into submission. They are the most uncomfortable team in the league to face, and they like it that way.
team.club_culture: Hostile, intense, and confrontational. The Furnace believe the match should be a war of attrition, and they intend to win it.
team.political_leaning: Venusian hardline-militant — a club with a chip on its shoulder and a grievance for every occasion.
trophy_cabinet: A scattering of titles won through sheer aggression
legends: Pyra Stone — the snarling captain who reportedly never finished a season without a suspension
achievements: Most opposition errors forced in the league
Most feared away day in the system

stadium.date_built: A sealed pressure-dome arena, one of the oldest on Venus.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the atmospheric-processing combines that make the cities liveable.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact and tight, deliberately cramped to make the press inescapable.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the dome's heat and humidity.
stadium.bio: Pressure Cooker Stadium is exactly that — a sealed, sweltering bowl where the noise has nowhere to escape and neither do visiting teams. The home crowd treats intimidation as a civic duty.

training_facility.date_built: A professional complex inside one of the larger pressure domes.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded on the modest budgets of the processing-combine unions.
training_facility.bio: The Volcanic Edge Training Ground drills one thing above all: the relentless, coordinated press. Sessions are brutal, conditioning is merciless, and players learn that the whistle is just an excuse to hunt the ball harder.

manager.appearance: Stocky and seething, prowls the technical area like a man looking for an argument.
manager.bio: Ignis Ferrara is fury with a clipboard — a former hard-man midfielder who builds teams in his own image. His aggressive, high-tempo football is designed to make opponents crack, and his touchline conduct is a legend (and a liability) in its own right.
manager.playing_history: A notoriously aggressive midfield destroyer, more cards than goals.
manager.playing_philosophy: Make them hate every minute. Press, provoke, and pounce on the mistakes that pressure always produces.
manager.culture: A son of the pressure domes who treats every match as a grievance to settle.
achievements: Turned a modest squad into the league's most feared pressing side

managing_staff.appearance: Wiry and watchful, forever scribbling dead-ball routines in a battered notebook.
managing_staff.bio: Aero Caldas is the cold tactician behind the Furnace's fury — the set-piece specialist who ensures all that aggression converts the corners and free-kicks the chaos earns.
managing_staff.personality: Calculating and precise; the calm inside the storm.
managing_staff.playing_history: A modest defender who found his calling in the details of dead balls.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Aggression wins set pieces; planning wins the goals from them.
managing_staff.culture: The cold edge to the club's heat.
achievements: Most set-piece goals in the league

players.appearance: Fierce and vocal, a keeper who screams the press into shape.
players.bio: Acid Rynn is an aggressive, commanding keeper who sweeps high behind the Furnace's suffocating line and bullies her own defenders into position.
achievements: Most defensive actions outside the box by a keeper

players.appearance: Bullish and snarling, attacks every duel.
players.bio: Magma Torres is the aggressive full-back who sets the tone, pressing high and intimidating wingers out of the game.
achievements: Most fouls committed and won in the squad

players.appearance: Veteran and gnarled, a workhorse who never stops hounding.
players.bio: Sulfur Vogt is the relentless engine of the back line, pressing for ninety minutes with a stamina forged in the domes.
achievements: Most pressures applied by a defender

players.appearance: Balanced and cool, the rare calm head in a hot side.
players.bio: Lava Osei is the level-headed centre-back who keeps the aggression from tipping into recklessness, the safety valve of the Furnace.
achievements: Fewest cards among the starters

players.appearance: Selfless and sturdy, the organiser of the press.
players.bio: Basalt Ferreira is the team-first defender who coordinates the pressing traps, the brain that keeps the chaos collective.
achievements: Most coordinated press triggers

players.appearance: Sharp and inventive, the rare creator amid the chaos.
players.bio: Fume Nakamura is the creative spark who makes the turnovers count, the one Furnace player who can pass as well as press.
achievements: Most chances created from turnovers

players.appearance: Balanced and busy, covers every inch of the cramped pitch.
players.bio: Cloud Ortega is the balanced midfield engine who links the press to the attack, equally willing to win the ball or use it.
achievements: Most ball recoveries in midfield

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the midfield's unsung runner.
players.bio: Plume Desjardins is the team-first shuttler who never stops hunting, sacrificing himself so the front men can rest for the kill.
achievements: Most distance covered in the side

players.appearance: Predatory and ruthless, lurks for the broken ball.
players.bio: Crater Mwangi is the selfish finisher who feeds on the panic the press creates, lethal when defenders are forced into mistakes.
achievements: Most goals from forced errors

players.appearance: Strong and relentless, the first line of the press.
players.bio: Tectonic Leroy is the workhorse forward who leads the hunt from the front, hounding defenders into the long balls the Furnace devour.
achievements: Most forward pressures in the league

players.appearance: Balanced and direct, the outlet on the break.
players.bio: Pyrex Stavros is the composed forward who finishes the chaos, carrying the ball into space when the press wins it high.
achievements: Most goals from high turnovers

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Haze Kimura is the cautious veteran second keeper, a steadying foil to the fiery Rynn.
achievements: Long backup service

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender learning to press.
players.bio: Soot Petrova is the promising young defender being taught the Furnace's relentless ways, calm but quick to bare her teeth.
achievements: Academy graduate

players.appearance: Heavy-legged and unbothered, an ill fit for the press.
players.bio: Geyser Mbeki has the talent but not the lungs for Ferrara's system, a veteran kept for the games his cunning can still win.
achievements: A hard man in his prime
players.injuries: Fully fit, ill-suited to the high tempo.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Cinder Liu is the creative deputy who offers a different answer when the press alone won't break a side, a youngster with rare vision.
achievements: Youth player of his year

players.appearance: Lean and ferocious, a teenage striker who presses like a veteran.
players.bio: Venom Shah is the academy prodigy made for the Furnace — selfish, relentless, and already snarling at defenders twice his age.
achievements: Youth top scorer
